title: Likstro
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Food |image= |name=Likstro |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found= |type=Beverage[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible=[[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation=[[Panky's]] }} {{Quote|Surely you have more worthwhile ways to spend your energy. Let me get you another drink, and we'll be on our way. ''[…]''''"
"''A Likstro. ''[…]'' A large one.|Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi and an Aqualish|}} '''Likstro''' was a beverage [[Diet/Legends|edible]] by members of the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. after [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] bumped into an [[Unidentified Aqualish (Panky's)|Aqualish]] and subsequently spilled [[Gender/Legends|his]] drink in the [[Restaurant/Legends|diner]] [[Panky's]] on the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Barlok system/Legends|Barlok system]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]], Skywalker's [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi Wan Kenobi]], [[Merchant/Legends|bought]] a large Likstro as an apology to the Aqualish. ==Behind the scenes== Likstro appeared in the [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']], written by [[Timothy Zahn]]. ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Likstro }} [[Category:Beverages]]
